allIssues.issue_description: credibility: The security page headline promises "SOC 2 Aligned Security to Safeguard Your Data", suggesting alignment rather than certification, whereas other pages (e.g. the enterprise and platform pages) claim "SOC 2-compliant" infrastructure and "SOC 2 compliance", which implies formal certification; these differing phrases may mislead users about LottieFiles' actual SOC 2 status.
allIssues.suggested_fix: Clarify sitewide whether LottieFiles is fully SOC 2 certified or only aligned, then use a single consistent term ("SOC 2 certified" or "SOC 2 aligned") in all locations.
allIssues.evidence: /security: "SOC 2 Aligned Security" vs /enterprise: "staying fully compliant with SOC 2" and /platform: "SOC 2 compliant infrastructure"

allIssues.issue_description: credibility: The enterprise hero copy states the platform keeps teams "fully compliant with SOC 2", and later sections mention "SOC 2 compliant infrastructure", while the dedicated security page only describes "SOC 2 Aligned Security" without clearly stating certification; this inconsistency can confuse security-conscious buyers.
allIssues.suggested_fix: Confirm whether the organization is SOC 2 certified and adjust this page’s wording (and the security page) so they all describe the same level of SOC 2 adherence.
allIssues.evidence: /enterprise hero: "staying fully compliant with SOC 2"; later: "SOC 2-compliant enterprise-grade security" vs /security: "SOC 2 Aligned Security"
